``` (owner, module_name, fn_name, hook) -> exported function in non-FF{X|X2} module, ex. D3D11.dll!SomeFunction (owner, module_name, offset,  hook) -> private function in non-FF{X|X2} module or only one game, ex. FMODEX.dll+0x652B60, FFX.exe+0x37CD90 (owner, abs_fnaddr, hook)           -> member function/vtbl entry of object, ex. DXGISwapChain::Present() (owner, method_location, hook)      -> analogous FF{X|X2} functions, ex. PStreamFile::PStreamFile(), implicitly targeted to the loaded game ``` where ``method_location`` is ``FhMethodLocation(nint offset_ffx, nint offset_ffx2)``
